content:
I just finished chap4 and have a question about its conclusion
||francis pulls her sacrifice stunt because 1. There is only one hellhound and 2. It doesn’t exist unless it is hunting prey and therefore she needs to stay in the box with it because otherwise it will just follow them out of daffodil’s magic circle. If she dies as a squishy human in a box with an extradimensional horror, then won’t it say ‘well good job me no more prey here time to leave’ and then stop existing, and then realize ‘hm there’s some more travelers out there time to kill them’ and then come after the main cast again||

||daffodil's notes for francis were related to the method to trap the hellhound in a defined space. so the idea is that even after francis dies, the hellhound would not be able to escape because the room was designed to keep it in forever||
||although since time is admittedly funky there, theres a chance shes still alive||

||didn’t those notes say nothing worked and the takeaway from the notes were that u just had to lock urself away? but that is also just the surface level takeaway that francis had, I might try to review those notes so I can settle my question||
||daff gave keeper incomplete information, but francis offered something better (her head), so daff gave her the room layout + the required runes so its more effective||
the schordinger mentally ill single mom
Miryam will mald if she heard this
